ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Name of the game developer */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platforms on which the game is available */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gaming session */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game being played */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user playing the game */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, completed, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the interaction occurred */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the interaction */,
  "round_num" INTEGER /* Current round number of the game */,
  "occurrence_num" INTEGER /* Occurrence number of the interaction in the round */,
  "intended_obj" TEXT /* Object intended to be clicked by the user */,
  "clicked_obj" TEXT /* Object clicked by the user */,
  "obj_box" INTEGER /* Box or area of the object clicked */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the interaction was correct (boolean) */,
  "reaction_time" INTEGER /* Reaction time in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated game */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round in the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round's objectives */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of round (e.g., puzzle, combat, exploration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_rounds_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session associated with these metrics */,
  "total_interactions" INTEGER /* Total number of interactions in the session */,
  "correct_interactions" INTEGER /* Number of correct interactions */,
  "incorrect_interactions" INTEGER /* Number of incorrect interactions */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy percentage */,
  "average_reaction_time" REAL /* Average reaction time in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Player, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game containing the object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object (e.g., enemy, platform, power-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_objects_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_object_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object interacted with */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., click, hover, drag) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_object_interactions_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES game_objects ("object_id")
)
